name: IT E-Commerce & Hardware Resale
description: Online and direct-sales distribution of IT hardware, peripherals, and software licenses to business customers. Bechtle operates one of Europe's largest B2B IT e-commerce platforms, serving as the entry point for many customer relationships that later expand into managed services.

tam.scope: European B2B IT hardware and software distribution
tam.source: LLM estimate based on EITO/Context proxies

growth_drivers: Consolidation of IT procurement to fewer vendors
